notableEvents.label: Edouard Julien pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien flies out to left fielder Juan Soto.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to second baseman Willi Castro to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Carson Benge out at 2nd. Francisco Alvarez out at 1st.
